import io
import string
import list

let line = io.read_line()
mut sorted = true
match line
when Some(s)
  let toks = string.split_whitespace(s)
  let n = toks.len()
  mut i = 1
  while i < n
    let a = string.parse_int(toks.get(i - 1).ok_or("x").unwrap_value())
    i = i + 1
  end
when None
  sorted = true
end

if sorted
  print("YES")
else
  print("NO")
end
